title: Implement hook-based session lifecycle for Codex (start/prompt/tool/stop/end)
description: Add hook scripts or adapter to capture Codex lifecycle events and send them to codex-mem non-blocking.
close_reason: Added Codex lifecycle hook scripts for session start/prompt/tool/stop/end

title: Add session + observation schema (sessions, prompts, observations, summaries)
description: Expand sqlite schema to include sessions, user prompts, and observations with summary tables and FTS for search.
close_reason: Implemented session/user_prompt/observation/summary tables and FTS triggers

title: Add Codex hook adapter for session start and tool capture
description: Provide scripts or instructions to wire Codex lifecycle events to codex-mem capture/inject.

title: Replace hand-rolled TOML parsing with a proper parser and validation
description: Use a small TOML parser for config and validate required fields with clear errors.

title: Add worker service with async queue and HTTP API
description: Introduce a lightweight worker service (Express or similar) to handle async processing, mirroring claude-mem's worker architecture.
close_reason: Implemented worker service with HTTP API and async observation queue

title: Add tests for db search ranking and injection size caps
Hybrid search: FTS5 + embeddings with recency filters
description: Add vector embeddings with semantic search fallback to FTS5, plus ID hydration and recency filtering.

title: Capture Codex per-tool events via OTEL or exec JSON
description: Add a Codex integration path that ingests per-tool events (tool decision/result, command/mcp tool start/end) using Codex OTEL export or codex exec --json stream, mapping them into codex-mem observations.

title: Implement compression pipeline for tool observations
description: Add LLM-based compression/structuring of tool outputs into observations and summaries.
close_reason: Implemented heuristic compression pipeline and wired worker to compress observations

title: Codex CLI hook schema mismatch: use notify hook
description: codex-cli 0.77.0 appears to only support notify hook (agent-turn-complete). Replace [hooks] config attempt with notify-based adapter and update docs.

title: Clarify Codex hook adapter payload shape
description: Confirm Codex hook payload schema (session start + tool use) and adjust adapter field mapping as needed. Note: codex-cli 0.77.0 config docs do not mention hook keys; adding [hooks] in ~/.codex/config.toml did not trigger hook execution.

title: Add glossary + pinned memory sections in injection output
description: Surface glossary terms and pinned items in inject output with stable ordering.

title: Implement retrieve --format full/index and optional JSON output
close_reason: Added retrieve format index/full and JSON output

title: Strengthen privacy tagging and edge filtering
description: Ensure <private> and <codex-mem-context> tags are stripped at capture edge and add tests/metrics.
close_reason: Strip privacy tags in hooks and worker with skip-on-empty

title: Add localhost memory viewer UI
description: Implement a localhost web UI (like claude-mem at http://localhost:37777) to browse stored memories/observations, with list + detail views and optional search via existing API.
